_comment: Rename this file to settings.json and configure as needed. The MCP servers below are examples — uncomment and fill in as you set them up. Format may vary by Claude Code version; check the docs.

_edgartools_example._comment: EdgarTools MCP — free, no API key needed. Required for reliable US 10-K/10-Q/8-K/Form 4 access in thesis-check, news-triage, earnings-debrief. See https://www.edgartools.io/edgartools-mcp-for-sec-filings/

_sec_edgar_alternative._comment: Alternative: edgar.tools hosted MCP, OAuth via Google. See https://www.edgar.tools/mcp

_transcripts_placeholder._comment: Earnings transcripts. No clean free MCP exists at this writing — earnings-debrief currently falls back to web search (IR pages, Motley Fool / Seeking Alpha public previews, company-hosted PDFs). Replace with a real transcript MCP when one becomes available.

_news_placeholder._comment: Premium news (Bloomberg/Reuters/FT-grade). Web search is sufficient for default news-triage cadence; this would be a future upgrade for tighter coverage windows on flagged names.

_uk_companies_house_placeholder._comment: UK Companies House — filings + ownership. Add when covering UK-listed names seriously. https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/

_eu_filings_placeholder._comment: EU filings — ESMA-registered storage portals per jurisdiction (BaFin Germany, AMF France, CONSOB Italy, CNMV Spain). Add per-country MCPs as coverage expands.
